/usr/bin/g++ -g -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/tcpserver_tests.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/tcpserver_tests.dir/tests/test_varint.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tcpserver_tests.dir/tests/test_packet.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tcpserver_tests.dir/src/protocol/varint.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tcpserver_tests.dir/src/protocol/packet.cpp.o -o tcpserver_tests  lib/libgtest_main.a lib/libgtest.a
